allocation.rationale: Roughly 65/35 split. Close to market-cap proportional (~75/25) but gives Europe enough representation for cross-regional analysis.

cap_tiers.rationale: Approximately 49/32/19 split. Large-cap dominant (reflects reality) but with meaningful mid/small-cap representation to avoid large-cap-only bias.

sector_weights_pct.rationale: All 11 GICS sectors represented. Industrials slightly over-weighted vs MSCI World due to natural EU market composition. Tech slightly under-weighted vs US-only benchmarks but realistic for a US+EU combined universe.

european_countries.rationale: 14 European countries. Weighted by market size: UK, Germany, France dominate; smaller markets still represented for geographic diversity.

biases_addressed: Geographic: covers 14 EU countries + US (original sample_100 missed Japan, China, Korea, Brazil, Scandinavia — now scoped to US+EU by design)
Market-cap tiers: includes large/mid/small (original was large-cap-only from flagship indices)
Sector balance: all 11 GICS sectors represented (original had no sector awareness)
Index-weight: allocation loosely proportional to market cap rather than equal-weight-per-index
biases_remaining: Survivorship: tickers reflect current constituents, not point-in-time. Stocks that were delisted, acquired, or dropped from indices since 2018 are excluded. This inflates apparent backtest returns.
Liquidity: no explicit liquidity filter applied. Some small-caps may have thin volume on certain days.
Currency: European stocks trade in local currencies (GBP, EUR, CHF, SEK, DKK, NOK, PLN). FX effects are embedded in returns unless hedged.
Static list: this is a fixed list, not dynamically rebalanced. Index composition changes over time are not reflected.
validation_note: All tickers should be validated against yfinance before use. Run a quick download check to confirm data availability for the desired date range and timeframes.

sources.EU_large: STOXX Europe 50 / national flagship indices (FTSE 100, DAX 40, CAC 40, SMI, AEX, IBEX 35, FTSE MIB, OMX Stockholm 30, OMX Copenhagen 25, OBX)
sources.EU_mid: STOXX Europe Mid 200 / FTSE 250 / MDAX / SBF 120
sources.EU_small: STOXX Europe Small 200 / national small-cap indices
